author: tmiychao
content:
<@&857649635274915900> Week 3 is starting today! We are moving further into the first month of fellowship, hope you are all still excited. By this week, your research should focus on more specific topics and zoom into what would become your project proposal later. 

Join us today for another standup to share your progress and let others know what your are diving into. At 3PM UTC as always! See you all soon. 

I have been catching up last week on your updates and messages, I am still missing couple to answer but feel free to bump any DM I might have missed.
